title: Sqlitelogictest crash on group by query with having in
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 INT, value2 FLOAT, value3 VARCHAR(255));
SELECT value1, SUM(value2) FROM test_table GROUP BY value1 HAVING SUM(value2) > 15;
SELECT value3, COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY value3 HAVING COUNT(*) < 3;
SELECT value1, AVG(value2) FROM test_table GROUP BY value1 HAVING AVG(value2) IN (SELECT AVG(value2) FROM test_table WHERE value1 > 1);
key_bug_features: Group by query with having clause in SQLite
